reasoning: Paul Biedermann set the 200m freestyle long course world record (1:42.00) in 2009 during the supersuit era. Therefore, the probability that the record remains unbroken during these specific dates is exceptionally high, decreasing only slightly across the short forecast horizon due to general uncertainty.
